## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` passes
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] No hardcoded credentials or secrets
- [ ] Write tools still require `confirm: true`
- [ ] Amount fields use `amountNaira` or `amountKobo`, never bare `amount`
- [ ] Sensitive fields (PAN, PIN, CVV, token) are redacted in logs and output
- [ ] README updated if new tools were added
